details.test: Task 1: Request quote from GOTS tee factory with lowest MOQ
Task 2: Add cheapest GRS recycled polyester fabric to Spring Collection
Task 3: Create Streetwear Drop Q3 project with sea freight and 3 products
Task 4: Schedule 30-minute sourcing consultation next Wednesday at 3:00 PM
Task 5: Compare factories and favorite one with shortest lead time
Task 6: Estimate landed cost for 500 hoodies and save with cheapest shipping
Task 7: Find DTG print-on-demand organic cotton supplier and shortlist highest rated
Task 8: Save BSCI article and GOTS guide to reading list
Task 9: Submit contact inquiry as new brand with 5,000 units plan
